generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values our nation's strength and independence, I'm glad to see more people recognizing that strategic autonomy isn't about isolation—it's about resilience. Look at how our allies are stepping up their own preparedness. It's not about burden-sharing in the old sense; it's about each of us ensuring we can stand strong together. The more we invest in our own capabilities, the more we contribute to collective security. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
